column5: Primary Mode of Payment on Campus
column7: Are you part of a student organization?
column8: If yes, choose anything that applies
column9: In what ways does your student organization use digital or cashless payments?
column10: "Please indicate your level of agreement with the following statements."  (1 of 5) [I feel it's important to use the same digital payment apps that my friends and classmates are using.]
column11: "Please indicate your level of agreement with the following statements."  (1 of 5) [I am confident in the security measures (like PINs and biometrics) of apps like GCash and Maya.]
column12: "Please indicate your level of agreement with the following statements."  (1 of 5) [The transaction fees for sending money or paying bills through these apps are reasonable.]
column13: "Please indicate your level of agreement with the following statements."  (1 of 5) [Advertisements and promotions I see for digital payment apps are generally believable.]
column14: "Please indicate your level of agreement with the following statements."  (1 of 5) [I actively seek out information and updates about digital payment technologies.]
column15: "Please indicate your level of agreement with the following statements."  (1 of 5) [The opinions of my student organization members influence which payment apps I trust.]
column16: "Please indicate your level of agreement with the following statements."  (1 of 5) [I worry about my personal financial data being compromised when using digital payment apps.]
column17: "Please indicate your level of agreement with the following statements."  (1 of 5) [I believe the costs of using digital payments are fair compared to the convenience they offer.]
column18: "Please indicate your level of agreement with the following statements."  (1 of 5) [Information about new features on payment apps is usually clear and easy to understand.]
column19: "Please indicate your level of agreement with the following statements."  (1 of 5) [I don't spend much time thinking about which payment app to use; I just use what's convenient at the moment.]
column20: "Please indicate your level of agreement with the following statements."  (2 of 5) [Seeing many UPLB students use a particular payment app makes me more likely to use it too.]
column21: "Please indicate your level of agreement with the following statements."  (2 of 5) [I trust that payment app companies will protect my privacy.]
column22: "Please indicate your level of agreement with the following statements."  (2 of 5) [I feel the exchange rates or service charges for international transactions (if applicable) are unjust.]
column23: "Please indicate your level of agreement with the following statements."  (2 of 5) [The information provided by official UPLB announcements regarding digital payments is trustworthy.]
column24: "Please indicate your level of agreement with the following statements."  (2 of 5) [For me, choosing a digital payment app is a significant decision that requires careful thought.]
column25: "Please indicate your level of agreement with the following statements."  (2 of 5) [I often ask my friends for recommendations before trying a new payment app.]
column26: "Please indicate your level of agreement with the following statements."  (2 of 5) [I believe that using digital payments on campus is safer than carrying a lot of cash.]
column27: "Please indicate your level of agreement with the following statements."  (2 of 5) [The occasional "convenience fees" charged by merchants for using digital payments feel unfair.]
column28: "Please indicate your level of agreement with the following statements."  (2 of 5) [I find the in-app notifications and messages from payment services to be useful and relevant.]
column29: "Please indicate your level of agreement with the following statements."  (2 of 5) [I am very interested in the topic of financial technology (fintech).]
column30: "Please indicate your level of agreement with the following statements."  (3 of 5) [My family's opinion matters when I decide whether or to use digital payment services.]
column31: "Please indicate your level of agreement with the following statements."  (3 of 5) [The process for reporting and resolving fraudulent transactions seems complicated.]
column32: "Please indicate your level of agreement with the following statements."  (3 of 5) [I believe the value I get from using digital payment apps is worth more than any fees I might pay.]
column33: "Please indicate your level of agreement with the following statements."  (3 of 5) [I am often skeptical about the marketing claims made by digital payment companies.]
column34: "Please indicate your level of agreement with the following statements."  (3 of 5) [I consider myself knowledgeable about the different digital payment options available.]
column35: "Please indicate your level of agreement with the following statements."  (3 of 5) [When a campus event or stall only accepts one type of digital payment, I feel pressured to use it.]
column36: "Please indicate your level of agreement with the following statements."  (3 of 5) [I am comfortable linking my bank account to a digital payment app.]
column37: "Please indicate your level of agreement with the following statements."  (3 of 5) [I think the pricing for services like GSave or GInvest is transparent and fair.]
column38: "Please indicate your level of agreement with the following statements."  (3 of 5) [I rely more on what my friends say about a payment app than what the app's official page says.]
column39: "Please indicate your level of agreement with the following statements."  (3 of 5) [How I pay for things is not a very important part of my daily life.]
column40: "Please indicate your level of agreement with the following statements."  (4 of 5) [The social trend of going "cashless" is a major reason why I use digital payments.]
column41: "Please indicate your level of agreement with the following statements."  (4 of 5) [I fear making a mistake (like sending money to the wrong number) that cannot be easily undone.]
column42: "Please indicate your level of agreement with the following statements."  (4 of 5) [It feels unfair when some apps charge for services that are free on other apps.]
column43: "Please indicate your level of agreement with the following statements."  (4 of 5) [The information on how to use new features within the apps is always adequate and helpful.]
column44: "Please indicate your level of agreement with the following statements."  (4 of 5) [I enjoy learning about and trying out new features within my payment apps.]
column45: "Please indicate your level of agreement with the following statements."  (4 of 5) [If a professor or a university office recommends a payment method, I am more likely to adopt it.]
column46: "Please indicate your level of agreement with the following statements."  (4 of 5) [I feel that the companies behind these apps are reputable and trustworthy.]
column47: "Please indicate your level of agreement with the following statements."  (4 of 5) [The "cash-in" fees at convenience stores or other outlets are a fair price for the service.]
column48: "Please indicate your level of agreement with the following statements."  (4 of 5) [Word-of-mouth is the most reliable source of information about the quality of a payment app.]
column49: "Please indicate your level of agreement with the following statements."  (4 of 5) [I don't really notice the differences between various payment apps; they all seem the same to me.]
column50: "Please indicate your level of agreement with the following statements."  (5 of 5) [Being part of a campus group (org) that uses a specific app for collections or payments is a strong motivator for me to use it.]
column51: "Please indicate your level of agreement with the following statements."  (5 of 5) [I am confident that my transaction history is kept private.]
column52: "Please indicate your level of agreement with the following statements."  (5 of 5) [I believe the promos and rewards offered by these apps provide real value and are not just gimmicks.]
column53: "Please indicate your level of agreement with the following statements."  (5 of 5) [I often ignore the promotional messages sent by payment apps.]
column54: "Please indicate your level of agreement with the following statements."  (5 of 5) [I am passionate about using technology to make my life easier.]
column55: "Please indicate your level of agreement with the following statements."  (5 of 5) [I prefer to use payment methods that are widely accepted among my peers.]
column56: "Please indicate your level of agreement with the following statements."  (5 of 5) [The risk of encountering scams through digital payment platforms concerns me.]
column57: "Please indicate your level of agreement with the following statements."  (5 of 5) [I think it is fair for these apps to charge extra for expedited services.]
column58: "Please indicate your level of agreement with the following statements."  (5 of 5) [The details about interest rates, fees, and charges within the apps are presented in a confusing way.]
column59: "Please indicate your level of agreement with the following statements."  (5 of 5) [I am not the type of person who follows technology trends closely.]
